text:
ORG_TIN 
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 
13 
ORG_TIN 
LABEL: 
Billing TIN of ACO Participant 
DESCRIPTION: The taxpayer identification number (TIN) of the participating provider, generally an employer 
identification number (EIN) but may be (in the case of professionals) a Social Security number (SSN). 
SHORT NAME: ORG_TIN 
LONG NAME: ORG_TIN 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
9 
SOURCE: 
CMS Participating Provider Pioneer ACO RIF
